response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, but lacks recent and focused C++ experience (last significant C++ work was in 2001). While they demonstrate strong systems design and architecture skills, their profile does not align closely with industrial automation, secure development lifecycle (SDL), or IEC 62443 standards. Their strengths lie in web, mobile, and embedded systems rather than high-performance, scalable C++ solutions for automation machinery.
strengths: Strong background in high-performance systems and low-latency applications (e.g., DLang, C++ for LabWindows/CVI)
Proven track record in system architecture, Agile methodologies, and cross-functional collaboration
Experience with secure development practices (TDD, CI/CD, code quality standards) and mentorship in technical teams
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience (last major C++ work was 20+ years ago)
No demonstrated exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or IoT/automation protocols
Lacks cloud platform experience (Azure) and modern C++ development practices (e.g., STL, multi-threading, message brokers)
